title: [Fleet Assessment][PP-BrokenWindows] Pragmatic broken-window markers remain in active code
[Fleet Assessment][PP-DRY] Pragmatic DRY violations are visible in repeated code windows
[Fleet Assessment][M] Configuration is not clearly externalized
[Fleet Assessment][B] Documentation coverage does not match repository breadth
[Fleet Assessment][H] CI coverage is incomplete or absent
MEDIUM: multiple issues — silent joint-name mismatches, dead IKProblem.target_frames field, magic number defaults in add_revolute_joint
HIGH: test_initial_pose_sets_defaults tests only check 'is not None' — any value (including 0.0) passes
HIGH: lumbar extension -10° and neck ±30° are too restrictive; no ankle initial angle for hip-hinge exercises
HIGH: compute_exercise_keyframes() ignores exercise type — all exercises receive identical single-DOF perturbation
HIGH: ensure_valid_urdf() only checks XML well-formedness and root tag — misses structural errors like dual-parent links
CRITICAL: barbell visual cylinders oriented along Z-axis — barbell renders vertically instead of horizontally
CRITICAL: barbell cylinder inertia computed for Z-axis but barbell extends along Y-axis — Iyy/Izz swapped
[Audit] High: Joint Limits Documented as Anatomically Sourced but Are ±π Radians
[Audit] High: FreeFlyer Joint Hardcoded Index in Pink IK Addon — Fragile and Incorrect
[Audit] Critical: Hardcoded Magic Numbers for Body Geometry — No Anthropometric Basis
